name: pds
description: PDS React components for agent-facing product surfaces.

scripts.build: pnpm clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const walk=(dir)=>{for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){const source=path.join(dir,entry.name);if(entry.isDirectory()) walk(source); else if(entry.name.endsWith('.css')){const output=path.join('dist',path.relative('src',source));fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(output),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(source,output)}}};walk('src')"
